# Security Research

Independent research — CVE analysis, malware analysis writeups, and notes on emerging threats. This is the section that builds long-term credibility, so entries here are added consistently over time rather than all at once.

## What goes here

- **CVE writeups** — analysis of publicly disclosed vulnerabilities (impact, root cause, detection guidance)
- **Malware analysis reports** — static/dynamic analysis of samples from safe research sources (e.g. TheZoo, MalwareBazaar), always in isolated VMs
- **Threat intel notes** — summaries of active threat actor TTPs relevant to specific sectors

## Structure for each entry

Each writeup should follow this format (see `TEMPLATE.md`):
1. Summary
2. Technical details
3. Impact / severity
4. Detection / mitigation guidance
5. References

## Index

| Date | Title | Type |
|---|---|---|
| _(add entries as research is published)_ | | |

## Safety note

All malware analysis is performed in isolated, network-segmented VMs with snapshots. No live samples are distributed through this repository — only written analysis and findings.
